changes: Remove vm_distro field from Config dataclass
Config.load(): read and discard vm.distro field (ubuntu -> INFO log, alpine -> existing FR5 guard handled differently now that the field is gone; alpine still raises via inline check)

public_api_changes: Config dataclass no longer has vm_distro attribute
Config.save() no longer emits distro key under vm
Config.load() silently discards distro: ubuntu with INFO log; distro: alpine still raises ConfigValidationError
cross_story_notes: After this story, Config has no vm_distro. cli.py line 254 and lima.py line 427 still reference it — those are Story 05 scope. Those files still compile because the field is accessed at runtime, not import time.
